# idsec_sia_settings_validate_fingerprint_for_ssh_zero_standing (Resource)

The SIA SSH fingerprint validation for Zero Standing connections resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "idsec_sia_settings_validate_fingerprint_for_ssh_zero_standing" "example" {
  enabled = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether SSH fingerprint validation is enabled for Zero Standing connections
